First community REWARD POOL

Shiba Airdrop 🎉

The Shiba Token #1 rewards those who have been active in the Crypto space community. In total 142,072 addresses have been airdropped. A snapshot of addresses was taken on 11/04/2025.

To claim the airdropped $SHIB, you need to connect with wallet you own that holds the airdropped token.
